description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a flat roof and a small raised section on top, resembling a rooftop access or attic. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks with visible weathering and a rustic finish. There are multiple rectangular windows with dark frames, and a prominent wraparound porch supported by wooden posts, accessible by a staircase on one side. The main entrance is located on the upper level, opening onto the porch, while the lower level features additional windows and a covered area beneath the porch. The structure is elevated slightly above ground level, with steps leading up to the porch, and the overall design evokes a Western or frontier architectural style.
description: A two-story rustic wooden cabin with a flat roof, wraparound porch, and multiple windows, featuring weathered wood and a prominent upper-level entrance.
description_view_0: This side view shows the horizontal wooden planks, two rectangular windows, and the staircase leading up to the porch on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the cabin with a single window and the porch extending along the right, with the staircase visible at the front.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entrance door on the upper level, two windows, and the full length of the wraparound porch supported by posts.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the porch's depth, the main entrance door, and the supporting posts beneath the upper level, with the steps leading up to the porch clearly visible.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with a small raised shed dormer section, constructed from wood
attribute_window_arrangement: Four rectangular windows, two on each visible side, symmetrically placed on both levels, with single windows spaced apart and no clustering
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door located on the upper level, centered on the front facade and opening onto the porch
